title: Update a Billing Group
content:
Use this endpoint to update the settings of a Billing Group. Both Agency and Direct Business Centers are able to perform billing group related operations. > **Note**
Only users with Finance Manager or Finance Analyst permission can manage payments and invoices in a Business Center. You can use [/bc/member/invite/](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1739939455765505) and [/bc/member/update/](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1739696704424961) to configure or update access settings for members. ## Comparing v1.2 and v1.3 The following table outlines the differences between v1.2 and v1.3 endpoints. ```xtable |Changes{30%}|v1.2{35%}|v1.3{35%}| |---|---|---| |Endpoint path|/v1.2/bc/billing_group/update/|/v1.3/bc/billing_group/update/ | | Request parameter name | `billing_group_name`
`billing_group_emails` | `new_billing_group_name`
`new_billing_group_emails`| | Request parameter data type | `bc_id`: number
`billing_group_id`: number
`delete_advertiser_ids`: number[]
`add_advertiser_ids`: number[] |`bc_id`: string
`billing_group_id`: string
`delete_advertiser_ids`: string[]
`add_advertiser_ids`: string[] | ``` ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/billing_group/update/ **Method** POST **Header** ```xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{35%}|Description{35%}| |---|---|---| |Access-Token{Required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| |Content-Type{Required}|string|The content type of the request.
Allowed value: `"application/json"`.| ``` **Parameters** ```xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| | bc_id {Required} | string | Business Center ID | | billing_group_id{Required} | string | ID of the billing group you'd like to edit | | new_billing_group_name | string | New billing group name | | new_billing_group_emails | string[] | List of emails for the billing group. If this field is provided, this new list of emails will overwrite the billing group's existing emails | | add_advertiser_ids | string[] | List of ad account IDs you want to add to this billing group | | delete_advertiser_ids | string[] | List of ad account IDs you want to remove from this billing group | | is_primary | boolean| Whether to set this billing group as the default billing group for the Business Center | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl -H "Access-Token:xxx" -H "Content-Type:application/json" -X POST \ -d '{ "bc_id": "BC_ID", "billing_group_id": "BILLING_GROUP_ID", "new_billing_group_name": "NEW_BILLING_GROUP_NAME", "new_billing_group_emails": "NEW_BILLING_GROUP_EMAILS", "add_advertiser_ids": [ "ADD_ADVERTISER_IDS" ], "delete_advertiser_ids": [ "DELETE_ADVERTISER_IDS" ], "is_primary": "IS_PRIMARY" }' \ https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/billing_group/update/ (/code) ``` ## Response ```xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |code |number | Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |message |string | Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |data |object| Returned data. | |request_id|string|The log id of the request, which uniquely identifies a request. | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "message": "OK", "code": 0, "data": {} } (/code) ```
